queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating effect of loan duration in months on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk associated with the absence of a checking account and its contribution to increased default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of checking account balances between 0 and 200 DM on elevated credit risk exposure.
